theme.description: Choose your preferred theme. The moon theme is dark with purple accents, perfect for night use. The sun theme is light and bright, ideal for daytime.

embedding.maxContextTokensHint: Set to 0 to use default (512 tokens). Required for local services where n_ctx cannot be queried.

llm.enableDesc: Allow AI assistant to answer questions
llm.noModels: No models configured yet. Click + to add one.

language.description: Select your preferred language. Additional languages can be installed via extension plugins.
language.onlyDefault: Only English is available by default. Install a language pack extension for more languages.
